case_title: ZAMONSKY, JOHN C. VS BROWN, DOROTHY MS.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,150.00 FILED BY ZAMONSKY, JOHN C. AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, DOROTHY MS. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-31-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY BROWN, DOROTHY MS. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT ZAMONSKY, JOHN C. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-31-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZAMONSKY, JOHN C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWN, DOROTHY MS. $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,050.00, PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO AMEND THE CLAIM TO: $1648.00 IS GRANTED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BROWN, DOROTHY MS. RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT ZAMONSKY, JOHN C. $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,050.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
